name: Y.C.C. Parts Mfg. Co., Ltd.
summary: Y.C.C. Parts Mfg. Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells auto plastic parts in Taiwan, North America, South America, Europe, and Asia. It offers bumpers, grilles, head lamp mounting panels, valances, head lamps, and other products, as well as bumper covers and lower valances. The company was founded in 1986 and is based in Lukang Town, Taiwan.
